import requests

# 调用 notes_list 获取笔记列表
list_resp = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:56721/notes/list",
    json={"max_results": 10}
)
print("=== Notes List Response ===")
print(f"Status: {list_resp.status_code}")
print(f"Response: {list_resp.text}")

# 解析返回数据
list_data = list_resp.json()
print(f"\n=== Parsed Notes ===")
if 'results' in list_data:
    for note in list_data['results']:
        print(f"Note ID: {note.get('note_id')}, Title: {note.get('title', 'N/A')}")
        print(f"  Content preview: {note.get('content', '')[:100]}...")
else:
    print(list_data)
</parameter>
